notes: SMA-34803 prototype. Wires upstream iceberg detector (SMA-34796) and VPVR level detector (SMA-34790) into a multi-TF backtest.
Direction comes from the VPVR level type: long at HVN absorption, short at LVN rejection. The staged OHLCV parquets have no taker_buy_base, so iceberg side_proxy is 'unknown' for every bar.
Sharpe is daily-resampled per SMA-34787 audit convention.
1d TF is BANNED by smark 2026-07-11 directive; this prototype uses 1m + 15m + 4h.
Two variants are reported side-by-side: 'iceberg_only' (LOID flag, no VPVR filter) and 'iceberg_vpvr_confluence' (the SMA-34803 ask).
